textByHash.03af45929142654619d01b34959804f15cd87bc2: The ceremonial clothes are made from the hides of the Suqah monsters. Bring them to me and I will tan them for you. You can then craft them into the top, trousers, gloves and boots.
textByHash.0ee3cc9ad1eea1b780951ac4ebbc6288dcc6ee42: I certainly do! A real tricky set of garments to make.
textByHash.28e9283b40ef312c87b737179c5c862b03c8d907: Take a look around. We use it in our day to day lives, from making a cup of tea, to travelling around the island. You see our ancestors were the ones that found the first rune essence and put it to use! The various
textByHash.2dd49ffb3f40e5154144c7f676f211d0a49e5d0d: Got any Suqah hides you want me to tan?
textByHash.2e26ef908c65205d0fcfc7901b0cc68ef388989b: Of course. We integrate magic into all areas of our lives. It is a part of everyone, so why deny it? It's best to make the most of this innate gift we have all been given.
textByHash.408554073ab3c8769c523dc2ecc48d106b2402a1: Just kill some of the Suqah monsters dotted around the outskirts of this island.
textByHash.43aada9410d29505f427066e9105a7d8b455f4be: factions were eventually created, with people having different ideas on how the essence should be used (or not in some cases!)
textByHash.5c0246daf65649a9a1843fea6130a6c10fc2f9ab: A pleasure doing business with you!
textByHash.84b73a129f4a963fa5c50de34645f205f975e115: All I can really help you out with is the tanning of the hides.
textByHash.91aabdcb3df66f399dd0e497f60ac6c547aba492: It may be a bit beyond you, but although magic comes from within, we are all very strongly linked to the moon and the effects it has on us cannot be denied!
textByHash.9d9dddb8d05909d38e676bca1a189cfa9d169f4d: harmony with them, because they provide us with a great many materials when they die, and in turn we have given them magic to help protect themselves.
textByHash.ac9eae55b726537100d857a2667e63f6b6b1ee3c: Why thank you. It's been our haven for a great many generations.
textByHash.b68d6ab7c4949c9d75f20441f9c712ac9d08b4fc: Welcome to the clothes store. How might I help you?
textByHash.c8f2aa73e23ce79cc03a5c7adb7f639997813c87: At 100 gold pieces per hide, that'll cost you... gp.
textByHash.ccad93f66284f7cb836893b21e5bc4db3a8d4781: Of course not. This very island has a great link to our moon, which helps us understand ourselves - especially our dreams, which is the path to understanding magic.
textByHash.d3c99992264d4d82deef77fcfcef6bc84a3bc7bd: It's an interesting creature the Suqah. You see, they have been indigenous to this island since we arrived. They seem to thrive of eating the minerals that exist in the mines below the town. We try our best to live in
